purpose: All reviewers (validator / claude_review / product_review and future lanes) emit the same JSON shape so structure can be enforced without a dependency. Enforced by the hand-rolled stdlib validate_review_output() in viewer_server.py (annotate-only: results are tagged schema_valid / schema_errors, never rejected).

top_findings.because: string — the reason, naming an artifact/file/command/missing-evidence
top_findings.required_evidence: string (optional) — what evidence would satisfy this finding

rules.verdict: must be one of pass | needs_retry | blocked
rules.top_findings: must be a list with at most 5 items
rules.top_findings[].severity: must be one of high | medium | low

validator.behavior: stdlib only; never raises; returns (False, [...]) for non-dict or any rule violation
